content:
CIRCUIT_TYPE:
Differential Comparator / Latch (inferred due to incomplete netlist)

TOPOLOGY_GROUPS:

[REGENERATIVE_CORE]
Type: Cross-Coupled NMOS Latch
Devices: [MM7, MM6]
Roles:
    - MM7: Output | Type: NMOS | nf: 7
    - MM6: Output | Type: NMOS | nf: 7
Secondary_Tags:
    - MM7: SKILL_HINT:differential_pair
    - MM6: SKILL_HINT:differential_pair
Matching_Requirements:
    - MM7 and MM6 must be matched for differential operation.
    - SKILL_HINT:common_centroid for MM7, MM6.
    - SKILL_HINT:interdigitate for MM7, MM6.
Symmetry:
    - MM7 and MM6 are symmetric with respect to a central axis.
PAIR_MAPPING:
    - (MM7, MM6)

[PMOS_DIFFERENTIAL_CASCODE_LOADS]
Type: PMOS Cascode Active Load
Devices: [MM0, MM1, MM4, MM5]
Roles:
    - MM0: Load | Type: PMOS | nf: 7
    - MM1: Load | Type: PMOS | nf: 7
    - MM4: Cascode | Type: PMOS | nf: 7
    - MM5: Cascode | Type: PMOS | nf: 7
Secondary_Tags:
    - MM0: NONE
    - MM1: NONE
    - MM4: NONE
    - MM5: NONE
Matching_Requirements:
    - MM0 and MM1 must be matched.
    - MM4 and MM5 must be matched.
    - SKILL_HINT:common_centroid for (MM0, MM1) and (MM4, MM5).
    - SKILL_HINT:interdigitate for MM0, MM1, MM4, MM5.
Symmetry:
    - The cascode stack (MM0, MM4) is symmetric to (MM1, MM5).

[PMOS_BIAS_CURRENT_MIRROR]
Type: PMOS Current Mirror
Devices: [MM2, MM3]
Roles:
    - MM2: Reference | Type: PMOS | nf: 7
    - MM3: Bias | Type: PMOS | nf: 7
Secondary_Tags:
    - MM2: NONE
    - MM3: SKILL_HINT:bias_mirror, SKILL_HINT:bias_chain
Matching_Requirements:
    - MM2 and MM3 must be matched.
    - SKILL_HINT:common_centroid for MM2, MM3.
    - SKILL_HINT:interdigitate for MM2, MM3.
Symmetry:
    - NONE

[NMOS_TAIL_CURRENT_SOURCES]
Type: NMOS Current Sources
Devices: [MM8, MM9]
Roles:
    - MM8: Tail current source | Type: NMOS | nf: 7
    - MM9: Tail current source | Type: NMOS | nf: 7
Secondary_Tags:
    - MM8: SKILL_HINT:bias_chain
    - MM9: SKILL_HINT:bias_chain
Matching_Requirements:
    - MM8 and MM9 must be matched to provide balanced currents.
    - SKILL_HINT:common_centroid for MM8, MM9.
    - SKILL_HINT:interdigitate for MM8, MM9.
Symmetry:
    - MM8 and MM9 are symmetric.

[NMOS_BIAS_REFERENCE]
Type: NMOS Bias Reference
Devices: [MM10]
Roles:
    - MM10: Reference | Type: NMOS | nf: 7
Secondary_Tags:
    - MM10: SKILL_HINT:bias_chain
Matching_Requirements:
    - NONE
Symmetry:
    - NONE

CURRENT_FLOW_GRAPH:
- MM8 ΓåÆ MM7
- MM9 ΓåÆ MM6
- MM2 ΓåÆ MM3
- MM10 ΓåÆ MM8
- MM10 ΓåÆ MM9

NETLIST_GRAPH:
- MM7 ΓÇö MM6 : VOUTN : HIGH
- MM7 ΓÇö MM6 : VOUTP : HIGH
- MM7 ΓÇö MM0 : VOUTN : HIGH
- MM6 ΓÇö MM1 : VOUTP : HIGH
- MM7 ΓÇö MM8 : VX : MEDIUM
- MM6 ΓÇö MM9 : VY : MEDIUM
- MM0 ΓÇö MM4 : net_0_4 : MEDIUM
- MM1 ΓÇö MM5 : net_1_5 : MEDIUM
- MM0 ΓÇö MM1 : BiasP_cascode : MEDIUM
- MM4 ΓÇö MM5 : BiasP_cascode : MEDIUM
- MM0 ΓÇö MM4 : BiasP_cascode : MEDIUM
- MM2 ΓÇö MM3 : BiasP_ref : MEDIUM
- MM3 ΓÇö MM0 : BiasP_cascode : MEDIUM
- MM3 ΓÇö MM4 : BiasP_cascode : MEDIUM
- MM8 ΓÇö MM9 : BiasN_tail : MEDIUM
- MM8 ΓÇö MM10 : BiasN_tail : MEDIUM
- MM9 ΓÇö MM10 : BiasN_tail : MEDIUM
- MM4 ΓÇö VDD : VDD : LOW
- MM5 ΓÇö VDD : VDD : LOW
- MM2 ΓÇö VDD : VDD : LOW
- MM3 ΓÇö VDD : VDD : LOW
- MM8 ΓÇö GND : GND : LOW
- MM9 ΓÇö GND : GND : LOW
- MM10 ΓÇö GND : GND : LOW
